comment: Hardware ABI probe. Tests whether ctx[3] is the stock large-buffer descriptor: word 0 base pointer, word 1 end pointer, word 2 wrap/span. Arm first with UseBuf=0, then enable UseBuf to try a tiny comb in descriptor memory.

params.name: UseBuf
params.comment: 0=only report plausible descriptor as stereo wobble, 1=write a tiny comb into descriptor base memory.
